about.title: 一家面向实用深科技的新西兰公司。
about.intro: 我们融合人工智能、数据、软件和工程，创造负责任且具有现实价值的技术。
about.storyTitle: 从复杂理念到实用系统。
storyParagraphs: IndustrialOrigami.AI was established to bridge advanced research and practical commercial technology.
The company is developing an intelligent robotic hand while building wider capability in AI, data science, software engineering and intelligent automation.
Our method is evidence-led: understand the problem, build a focused prototype, measure performance, learn from users and scale only when the technical and commercial case is credible.

companyFacts.label: Focus
companyFacts.value: AI, robotics, data, software and intelligent engineering

companyFacts.label: Business model
companyFacts.value: Professional services, collaborative R&D and proprietary product development

companyFacts.label: Ambition
companyFacts.value: Locally owned capability with international relevance

about.teamDescription: 创始团队结合战略、人工智能、软件、数据科学、机械设计、CAD、制造和项目工程。

services.title: 围绕业务成果设计的技术服务。
services.intro: 我们结合研究与工程能力，帮助组织探索、构建和验证智能产品与系统。

items.title: 机器人与自动化
items.menuDescription: 自适应操作、传感、控制和自动化原型。
items.summary: Research and prototype development for robotic systems, intelligent end-effectors and industrial automation.
overview: We help investigate whether a robotic or automated solution is technically and commercially appropriate for a defined workflow.
Work may include mechanical concepts, sensor selection, control architecture, computer vision, prototype integration and staged validation.

items.title: 数据科学与分析
items.menuDescription: 预测建模、分析、仪表板和决策支持。
items.summary: Data products that help organisations understand operations, identify patterns and support decisions.
overview: We structure analytical work around a clear business or operational question rather than producing charts with no decision attached.
Projects may include forecasting, classification, statistical analysis, feature engineering, model evaluation and dashboard development.

items.title: 软件开发
items.menuDescription: 全栈平台、API、数据库、测试和云就绪系统。
items.summary: Maintainable web platforms, backend services and digital products built with modern engineering practices.
overview: We develop software with clear architecture, version control, testing, documentation and deployment pathways.
The service can cover responsive interfaces, APIs, backend services, relational databases, authentication, dashboards and cloud-ready packaging.

items.title: RAG 与智能助手
items.menuDescription: 具有检索、引用和评估的知识助手。
items.summary: Knowledge assistants grounded in approved organisational documents, data and controlled sources.
overview: Retrieval-Augmented Generation can help users find and understand information while reducing unsupported model answers.
A responsible implementation requires document governance, chunking, embeddings, retrieval, citations, evaluation, feedback and access controls.

items.title: 研究、原型与技术咨询
items.menuDescription: 可行性、原型、验证、融资和商业化支持。
items.summary: Structured support for technical uncertainty, early product concepts and research-to-market development.
overview: Early-stage technology work needs a defensible question, a staged plan and measurable evidence.
We support feasibility analysis, architecture, prototype planning, validation metrics, technical writing, funding preparation and commercialisation pathways.

projects.title: 具有可衡量技术目标的重点项目。
projects.intro: 我们的组合包括一个活跃的旗舰研发项目以及明确标注的技术演示和未来商业化概念。

items.title: 智能机器人手
items.menuDescription: 利用传感、边缘人工智能和确定性控制实现自适应操作。
items.statusDescription: The concept and system architecture are being developed through staged technical and commercial validation.
items.summary: A modular robotic hand and forearm platform combining mechanical engineering, sensing, real-time control, computer vision and edge AI.
overview: Conventional industrial grippers perform well for repetitive tasks and predictable objects but may be less useful when shape, orientation, fragility or material changes.
The project investigates whether a modular, force-aware and vision-guided hand can provide useful flexibility without becoming impractically complex or expensive.
Development begins with an index-finger and thumb mechanism before a complete multi-finger system is attempted.
technology: Approximately fifteen actuators in the full concept
Force, current, position and tactile sensing
EtherCAT or another deterministic industrial link

roadmap.title: Finger and thumb
roadmap.description: Validate linkage, force, actuation, sensing, control and safety.

roadmap.title: Integrated hand
roadmap.description: Combine multiple digits, perception, planning and industrial communication.

roadmap.title: Industry pilot
roadmap.description: Test a narrow application and quantify performance, cost and value.

items.title: 工业 RAG 平台
items.menuDescription: 面向技术与企业知识的来源支撑型助手。
items.statusDescription: This project is presented as a portfolio and future service concept rather than a completed customer deployment.
items.summary: A multilingual knowledge platform that retrieves approved technical documents and produces source-aware answers for employees, customers and engineers.
overview: Industrial organisations often store valuable knowledge across manuals, policies, reports, specifications and project documents.
The platform demonstrates ingestion, chunking, embeddings, vector retrieval, citations, multilingual interaction, evaluation and feedback.
It is intended to become both a company knowledge assistant and a reusable demonstration of responsible LLM integration.
value: Portfolio evidence for RAG and full-stack roles

roadmap.title: Document pipeline
roadmap.description: Build ingestion, chunking, metadata and vector storage.

roadmap.title: Assistant and citations
roadmap.description: Create retrieval, answer generation and source display.

roadmap.title: Evaluation and access control
roadmap.description: Add quality metrics, feedback, authentication and permissions.

items.title: 预测性维护
items.menuDescription: 用于设备风险和维护计划的机器学习信号。
items.statusDescription: The project requires a suitable equipment dataset and industry partner before performance claims can be made.
items.summary: A data and machine-learning system for identifying abnormal equipment behaviour and supporting maintenance decisions.
overview: Unplanned equipment failure can create downtime, cost and safety risk, but useful prediction depends on data quality and a clearly defined failure or degradation signal.
The project demonstrates how sensor histories, maintenance records and operational context can be prepared, modelled and monitored.
The system will compare practical baselines with more advanced methods rather than assuming that a complex model is automatically better.

roadmap.title: Data and failure definition
roadmap.description: Assess sensor coverage, labels, maintenance history and business value.

roadmap.title: Model and dashboard
roadmap.description: Develop baselines, evaluation and operational visualisation.

roadmap.title: Pilot monitoring
roadmap.description: Validate alerts, drift, false positives and maintenance usefulness.

items.title: 数字孪生
items.menuDescription: 用于测试智能决策的仿真与监控环境。
items.statusDescription: The digital twin is a future research and demonstration project and is not yet represented as a deployed product.
items.summary: A near-real-time virtual representation of a physical or networked system for simulation, monitoring and safe evaluation of intelligent decisions.
overview: A digital twin can combine system state, historical data, simulation and analytics to help teams explore changes before applying them to a live environment.
The concept extends earlier research interests in network and intelligent-system optimisation while remaining applicable to industrial systems.
A credible implementation requires a defined asset, update frequency, simulation fidelity and decision use case.
value: Support for optimisation and predictive decisions

roadmap.title: Use case and model
roadmap.description: Define the physical or networked system, variables and simulation purpose.

roadmap.title: Data synchronisation
roadmap.description: Connect state data, dashboards and scenario controls.

roadmap.title: Decision experiments
roadmap.description: Evaluate optimisation, prediction or control strategies before deployment.

careers.title: 参与在新西兰构建实用人工智能与机器人。
careers.intro: IndustrialOrigami.AI 是一家早期公司，正在与对未来技术、研究和商业机会感兴趣的人建立联系。

pathways.title: Technical contribution
